steps.title: Use the ranking evidence
steps.content: The passage says the sixth most commonly used password in 2012 was easy to remember. The blank needs a word that matches a choice being common or frequently selected.

steps.title: Match the common-use idea
steps.content: A contradicts the idea of an easily remembered password, B shifts to usefulness, and C repeats the complicated approach that users are avoiding. The needed word describes what many users actually choose. The answer is D.
